description: A graphic with a blue banner reading 'Original Statement from DHS' over a screenshot of an email. The From, To and Cc fields are partly redacted; the subject line references a media inquiry about DHS detention at a Rancho Cucamonga courthouse dated April 9, 2026. The body is several quoted paragraphs describing arrests in immigration enforcement operations, with some phrases bolded.
notable_text: Original Statement from DHS; RE: Media Inquiry Regarding DHS Detention at Rancho Cucamonga Courthouse on April 9, 2026
